positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical celestial forest scene, featuring stylized bioluminescent flora and fauna. Central composition showcasing massive, interwoven root systems forming natural arches. The color palette is rich jewel tones (sapphire blue, emerald green, amethyst purple) contrasted against stark obsidian black and luminous gold accents. Style should be a blend of Art Nouveau illustration and modern vector art, emphasizing clean silhouettes, sharp edges, and deep contrasts. Lighting must be dramatic and ethereal, emanating primarily from the glowing plants (rim lighting). The overall aesthetic must be perfectly flat for printing, resembling a complex, high-end woodcut or mandalic print design. Central focus, perfect symmetry, highly decorative, suitable for large-scale fabric printing.
negative: blurry, low quality, artifacts, noisy, text, watermark, logos, signatures, messy, bad anatomy, disfigured, tiling, repetitive patterns (if used as single placement), photorealism, gradients, depth of field
